children.text: I am glad to be a reporter for Students' Voice to share my visit to First Hill Farm.
The farm was beautiful and there were many trees and plants.
children.cn: 这个农场很漂亮，有很多树木和植物。
我很高兴能成为《学生之声》的记者，分享我参观第一山农场的经历。

children.text: We did many interesting things during the day.
First, we explored the farm and identified some plants.
children.cn: 首先，我们探索了农场并识别了一些植物。

children.text: Then, we picked some fresh vegetables like cucumbers.
children.cn: 然后，我们摘了一些新鲜蔬菜，比如黄瓜。

children.text: Finally, we planted some trees to protect the land.
children.cn: 最后，我们种了一些树来保护土地。
我们白天做了很多有趣的事情。

children.text: I was very happy and I learnt that farming is not easy.
It was really a day to remember for all of us.
children.cn: 这对于我们所有人来说，都是真正值得纪念的一天。
我非常高兴，并且我了解到耕作并不容易。
